use_cases: Triggering form submissions and actions in web applications
Navigation triggers for page routing or modal displays
Primary call-to-action buttons for conversion-focused interfaces
Destructive action confirmation buttons requiring user attention
ai_summary: A versatile button component built with Radix UI Slot for flexible composition, supporting multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Implements standard accessibility patterns with focus-visible outlines and keyboard navigation support, using subtle shadows and hover state transitions for visual feedback.
